title: John Woo
content:
use both this parameter and |birth_date to display the person's date of birth, date of death, and age at death) -- John Woo Yu-Sen <a href="Silver%20Bauhinia%20Star" SBS</a (; born 1 May 1946) is a <a href="Chinese%20people" Chinese</a film director, producer and screenwriter of <a href="action%20genre" action genre</a films in the <a href="Hong%20Kong%20people" Hong Kong</a film industry.

Woo is known for his highly chaotic action sequences, stylized imagery, <a href="Mexican%20standoff" Mexican standoff</a s, frequent use of <a href="slow%20motion" slow motion</a and allusions to <a href="neo-noir" neo-noir</a, "<a href="wuxia"wuxia</a" and <a href="Western%20%28genre%29" Western</a cinema.
